3074890.name: Theo Demo
3074890.description: The game is a global strategy with indirect control. The player, choosing one of the presented factions, must spread the influence of this faction to the countries of the world. Each faction has its own unique starting conditions and represents one of the modern geopolitical forces. To influence countries, the player needs to recruit characters who have influence on the foreign and domestic policies of the country. In the storyline, the player goes through key historical events that influenced the appearance of the modern world.
